zh.lifeSummary: Cecillia是William de Breton的女兒，於大約1255年出生在英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓。她於大約1271年與William de Dronsfield結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1303年在英國越可爾希爾可斯同享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecillia是William de Breton的女儿，于大约1255年出生在英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓。她于大约1271年与William de Dronsfield结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1303年在英国越可爾希爾可斯同享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cecillia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Cecillia was born about 1255, in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of William de Breton. She married William de Dronsfield about 1271. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1303, in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecillia est née environ 1255, à West Bretton, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de William de Breton. Elle a épousé William de Dronsfield environ 1271. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1303, à Silkstone, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilliaは約1255年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト ブレットオンでWilliam de Bretonの娘として生まれた。約1271年にWilliam de Dronsfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1303年にイギリスヨークシュアイアシルクストーンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecillia(은)는 대략 1255년 영국 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴에서 William de Breton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1271년 William de Dronsfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 영국 요르크실르 시크스톤에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecillia родилась около 1255 г. в местности вест бреттон, еркшир, Англия. Её отца звали William de Breton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Dronsfield около 1271 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1303 г. в местности силкстоун, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.
